breaches.label: AMYY
breaches.source: 6,163 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 15,344 60d med = 4,603 sh cap) (134% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 560,001 out = 196,000 sh cap) (3% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~2,481 sh on AMYY to reach warn band (1,560 sh over median vol (30% × 15,344 60d med = 4,603 sh cap)).

breaches.label: BBYY
breaches.source: 4,600 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,411 60d med = 423 sh cap) (1087% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 60,001 out = 21,000 sh cap) (22% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~4,261 sh on BBYY to reach warn band (4,177 sh over median vol (30% × 1,411 60d med = 423 sh cap)).

breaches.label: CWY
breaches.source: 1,299 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,600 60d med = 480 sh cap) (271% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~915 sh on CWY to reach warn band (819 sh over median vol (30% × 1,600 60d med = 480 sh cap)).

breaches.label: FBYY
breaches.source: 4,780 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 600 60d med = 180 sh cap) (2656% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (46% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~4,636 sh on FBYY to reach warn band (4,600 sh over median vol (30% × 600 60d med = 180 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HMYY
breaches.source: 3,486 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 2,971 60d med = 891 sh cap) (391% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 110,001 out = 38,500 sh cap) (9% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~2,773 sh on HMYY to reach warn band (2,595 sh over median vol (30% × 2,971 60d med = 891 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HOYY
breaches.source: 8,367 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 28,184 60d med = 8,455 sh cap) (99% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 1,410,001 out = 493,500 sh cap) (2% of cap)
breaches.action: Trim ~1,603 sh on HOYY toward warn band (8,367 sh short vs 8,455 sh median vol (30% × 28,184 60d med = 8,455 sh cap)).

breaches.label: IOYY

breaches.action: Cut ~6,334 sh on QBY to reach warn band (6,018 sh over median vol (30% × 5,270 60d med = 1,581 sh cap)).

breaches.action: Cut ~6,680 sh on RTYY to reach warn band (6,200 sh over median vol (30% × 8,000 60d med = 2,400 sh cap)).

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected net book carry over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, optional spike-revert path integral, and VIX-stressed borrow on short legs.

bucket_sleeve_panel.capital_reason: capital_snapshot missing from totals.json (run EOD after upgrade)
bucket_sleeve_panel.exposure_note: Exposure gross/net = delta-normalized (β × notional). Deployed capital = signed MV on etf_screened_today (screener universe). B3 is a flow overlay; B4 gross is ratio-split (pair-view in bucket detail).

borrow_shock_panel.note: Annualized carry = Σ |short notional| × borrow APR on held short ETFs. Shocks are applied to every leg's current APR; incremental = shocked − current.

shared_underlying_panel.note: Underlyings appearing in more than one accounting bucket share a single broker spot line that nets across sleeves; B4 attribution slices it.

winners.symbols: MSTP, MSTR, MSTU, MSTW, MSTX, MSTY, MSTZ, MTYY

movers_panel.note: Cumulative (YTD) PnL by underlying from pnl_by_underlying.csv.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Buckets 1, 2, 4, and 5
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Share-notional book (B1+B2+B4 ratio split + B5 vol ETP); excludes B3 overlay.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Bucket 3
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Delta-normalized flow hedge overlay (|β| × notional), not share gross.
